variants.title: Mann Filter 4405087996 Picolino | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAH 02C06SDP013
variants.description: Replacement and maintenance parts for the proven filter housings and systems from MANN+HUMMEL.

variants.title: HiFi Filter SAH 02C06SDP013 Complete Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAH 02C06SDP013 Complete Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAH 02C06SDP013 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
